decisions.decision: Body sweep ran as 7 parallel subagents with hard invariants (no number/cite/label/figure changes); orchestrator built + integrity-checked centrally
decisions.rationale: Each section is a distinct file (no edit conflicts); central build avoids LaTeX aux-file races.
